scenes.description: Koseki Bijou prepares to perform a song to escape the situation.
Koseki Bijou performs the song 'This game'.

subtitles.original: Maybe that'll be how I get out.
subtitles.english: Maybe that'll be how I get out.

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, I got it then.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, I got it then.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna sing and dance a song right now!
subtitles.english: I'm gonna sing and dance a song right now!

subtitles.original: Here we go!
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: This game!
subtitles.english: This game!

subtitles.original: This game / Lyrics: 涼内亜希 / Music: 若林充
subtitles.english: This game / Lyrics: Aki Suzuuchi / Music: Mitsuru Wakabayashi

subtitles.original: 廻り続ける
subtitles.english: Rotating around

subtitles.original: 愚か者に割り当てられた
subtitles.english: Assigned to the fools

subtitles.original: 平穏を演じる
subtitles.english: Acting out peacefulness

subtitles.original: 感情から始まった地獄
subtitles.english: The hell that started from emotions

subtitles.original: 遊び半分で神々が導いた
subtitles.english: Guided by gods in half-play

subtitles.original: 盤上の世界
subtitles.english: The world on the board

subtitles.original: No no no game no life
subtitles.english: No no no game no life

subtitles.original: ぬるい平穏をバッサリ切り捨てて
subtitles.english: Cutting off the lukewarm peace

subtitles.original: 栄光の階段に存在刻むんだ
subtitles.english: Carving my existence into the stairs of glory

subtitles.original: 目に映るのは完全勝利の運命
subtitles.english: What I see is the destiny of complete victory

subtitles.original: 何もかも計算どおり
subtitles.english: Everything is just as calculated

subtitles.original: 変えてやる 止まらない空白で
subtitles.english: I'll change it with the unstoppable blank space

subtitles.original: We are Maverick 救済なんていらない
subtitles.english: We are Maverick, no need for salvation

subtitles.original: どんな理不尽襲おうとも
subtitles.english: No matter what unreasonableness attacks

subtitles.original: 勝てばいいだけの話だ
subtitles.english: It's just a matter of winning

subtitles.original: 駆け引きと才能が無敗誘う
subtitles.english: Strategy and talent invite invincibility

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた日に触れた楽しさを
subtitles.english: The fun I felt on the day I was born

subtitles.original: 思い出していくんだ
subtitles.english: I'm starting to remember it

subtitles.original: 自分だけは自分信じてる
subtitles.english: I believe in myself, at least

subtitles.original: 心の底に潜む
subtitles.english: Hidden at the bottom of the heart

subtitles.original: 闇より強い相手はいない
subtitles.english: There is no opponent stronger than darkness

subtitles.original: 挫けぬ限りに敗北はありえない
subtitles.english: As long as I don't give up, defeat is impossible

subtitles.original: 上辺の個性で安心と引き換えに
subtitles.english: Exchanging peace for a superficial personality

subtitles.original: プライド殺すな
subtitles.english: Don't kill your pride

subtitles.original: No no no sense of life
subtitles.english: No no no sense of life

subtitles.original: 野蛮な雑音をキッパリ蹴飛ばして
subtitles.english: Kicking away the barbaric noise

subtitles.original: 誰より純粋な声上げるんだ
subtitles.english: Raising a voice purer than anyone's

subtitles.original: 戦うことはきっと間違いじゃない
subtitles.english: Fighting is surely not a mistake

subtitles.original: 手応えが教えてくれた
subtitles.english: The response taught me that

subtitles.original: 全て失っても勝ち残れ
subtitles.english: Even if I lose everything, survive and win

subtitles.original: We are Maverick 常識なんていらない
subtitles.english: We are Maverick, no need for common sense

subtitles.original: 前倣え向かう先に
subtitles.english: At the destination everyone follows

subtitles.original: 待ってるのは退屈な一辺倒
subtitles.english: What's waiting is a boring monotony

subtitles.original: つまらない 挑んでやる
subtitles.english: How boring, I'll challenge it

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた日の命を誇りにして
subtitles.english: Taking pride in the life from the day I was born

subtitles.original: 楽しむんだ
subtitles.english: Enjoy it

subtitles.original: 自分だけの道を最後まで
subtitles.english: Follow my own path until the end

subtitles.original: 迷わない 選ばれし者の自惚れでも
subtitles.english: No hesitation, even if it's the conceit of the chosen one

subtitles.original: 誇らしく生き抜くための
subtitles.english: To live through proudly

subtitles.original: 方法を一つしか知らないから
subtitles.english: Because I only know one way

subtitles.original: We are Maverick 救済なんていらない
subtitles.english: We are Maverick, no need for salvation

subtitles.original: どんな理不尽襲おうとも
subtitles.english: No matter what unreasonableness attacks

subtitles.original: 勝てばいいだけの話だ
subtitles.english: It's just a matter of winning

subtitles.original: 駆け引きと才能が無敗誘う
subtitles.english: Strategy and talent invite invincibility

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた日に触れた楽しさを
subtitles.english: The fun I felt on the day I was born

subtitles.original: 思い出していくんだ
subtitles.english: I'm starting to remember it

subtitles.original: 楽しむんだ
subtitles.english: Enjoy it

subtitles.original: この世界手にして笑うんだ
subtitles.english: Taking this world in hand and laughing

subtitles.original: We are Maverick 最強の空っぽゲーマー
subtitles.english: We are Maverick, the strongest empty gamers

subtitles.original: 空白ならば何者にもなれる
subtitles.english: If it's blank, I can become anything

subtitles.original: 自分だけは自分信じてる
subtitles.english: I believe in myself, at least
